testsuite.name: com.walter.datamaskingdemo.SimpleIntegrationTest
testsuite.system-out: === REGULAR USER TEST === Original email: Sincere@april.biz Masked email: Si***********.biz Original phone: 1-770-736-8031 x56442 Masked phone: 1-7**************6442 Regular user test PASSED - masking is working! === OWNER TEST === Current user: Bret Record username: Bret Original email: Sincere@april.biz Result email: Sincere@april.biz Owner test PASSED - owner sees unmasked data! === ADMIN USER TEST === Original email: Sincere@april.biz Result email: Sincere@april.biz Original phone: 1-770-736-8031 x56442 Result phone: 1-7**************6442 Admin user test PASSED - admin sees selective data!
